creator: vr0@unix.lu
text:
Hello, 

Update mariadb55-client/server-5.5.54_3 to mariadb55-client/server-5.5.55
result in build errors.


--- mysys/CMakeFiles/mysys.dir/my_new.cc.o ---

In file included from /usr/ports/databases/mariadb55-client/work/mariadb-5.5.55/mysys/mysys_priv.h:63:
/usr/local/include/mysql/psi/mysql_file.h:1370:11: error: use of undeclared identifier 'my_delete_with_symlink'

          ^
